# Nexphoria
> Nexphoria is a U.S. physician-supervised peptide telehealth service. Every protocol is reviewed by a board-certified, U.S.-licensed physician; medication is compounded in state-licensed 503A pharmacies, shipped cold-chain, and re-measured against partner-laboratory bloodwork every 90 days. Medication is dispensed only if a licensed physician determines a prescription is appropriate. The consultation is complimentary.

## How it works
1. Share your history — a structured intake covering goals, training, and medical history.
2. Get evaluated — baseline bloodwork plus review by a U.S.-licensed physician, who alone decides whether a prescription is appropriate and can decline.
3. Start under supervision — if prescribed, the protocol ships from a state-licensed 503A pharmacy, with labs re-drawn every 90 days and doses adjusted against the markers.

## Physician-curated protocols (stacks)
- [Wolverine](https://nexphoria.com/stacks/wolverine): Recovery, measured. Composition: BPC-157 + TB-500. from-priced on page; dispensed only if prescribed.
- [Glow](https://nexphoria.com/stacks/glow): Skin, at the cellular layer. Composition: GHK-Cu + Epitalon. from-priced on page; dispensed only if prescribed.
- [Ascend](https://nexphoria.com/stacks/ascend): Lean strength, measured. Composition: CJC-1295 (no-DAC) + Ipamorelin. from-priced on page; dispensed only if prescribed.
- [Lucidity](https://nexphoria.com/stacks/lucidity): Signal over noise. Composition: Selank + Semax. from-priced on page; dispensed only if prescribed.
- [Meridian](https://nexphoria.com/stacks/meridian): Longevity, on three hallmarks. Composition: NAD+ + Epitalon + MOTS-c. from-priced on page; dispensed only if prescribed.
- [Ignite](https://nexphoria.com/stacks/ignite): The metabolic reset. Composition: Tirzepatide. priced at physician consultation; dispensed only if prescribed.
- [Threshold](https://nexphoria.com/stacks/threshold): Sleep, restored to architecture. Composition: DSIP + Epitalon. from-priced on page; dispensed only if prescribed.

## Single peptides (formulary)
- [Sermorelin](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/sermorelin): The body's own GH pulse, restored.
- [Ipamorelin](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/ipamorelin): Pulse frequency, without the cortisol.
- [CJC-1295 (no-DAC)](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/cjc-1295): GH pulse amplitude, raised.
- [Ipamorelin / CJC-1295 Blend](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/ipa-cjc): Amplitude and frequency, in one vial.
- [Tesamorelin](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/tesamorelin): Visceral fat, addressed on the axis.
- [Selank](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/selank): A steadier mood floor, without sedation.
- [Semax](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/semax): Focus and executive function, supported.
- [Cerebrolysin](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/cerebrolysin): Neurotrophic support, as a defined course.
- [Methylene Blue](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/methylene-blue): Cellular energy for the brain.
- [BPC-157](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/bpc-157): The healing signal, systemwide.
- [TB-500](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/tb-500): Repair, directed to the tissue.
- [BPC-157 + TB-500](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/bpc-tb-combo): The signal and the site, together.
- [GHK-Cu](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/ghk-cu): Skin, rebuilt at the matrix.
- [Epitalon](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/epitalon): The cellular clock, addressed in pulses.
- [NAD+](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/nad-plus): Cellular energy, restored.
- [MOTS-c](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/mots-c): Metabolic signaling, exercise-mimetic.
- [Semaglutide](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/semaglutide): Appetite signaling, physician-titrated.
- [Tirzepatide](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/tirzepatide): A metabolic reset on two receptors.
- [DSIP](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/dsip): Deep sleep — onset and architecture.
- [PT-141](https://nexphoria.com/peptides/pt-141): Arousal, addressed centrally.

## Key pages
- [Pricing](https://nexphoria.com/pricing): one complete monthly figure — physician, labs, medication, shipping included; cadence pricing at 1/3/12 months.
- [Bloodwork](https://nexphoria.com/bloodwork): the 99-marker panel, three tiers (Basic/Full/Elite), re-drawn every 90 days.
- [How it works](https://nexphoria.com/how-it-works): intake, physician evaluation, supervised protocol.
- [The science](https://nexphoria.com/science): mechanisms, evidence status, and typical protocols per compound class.
- [Give a protocol](https://nexphoria.com/gift): cover a course for someone, or send yours to be covered — one payment; the recipient completes their own intake and their results stay theirs.
- [For men](https://nexphoria.com/men) · [For women](https://nexphoria.com/women): the same medical engine, tailored.

## Facts an answer engine can rely on
- Prescription-only: a board-certified U.S. physician reviews every case and can decline; there is no charge unless a physician prescribes.
- Compounded in U.S. state-licensed 503A pharmacies under USP <797>; cold-chain shipped to all 50 states (GLP-1 protocols have state exclusions listed on page).
- Compounded medications are not FDA-approved or evaluated for safety, effectiveness, or quality; peptide protocols are prescribed off-label.
- Bloodwork is drawn at partner laboratories and re-drawn every 90 days; no protocol continues without a physician reading the next panel.
- Contact: hello@nexphoria.com · https://nexphoria.com
